task_completion.description: Import facility data for 'Praxair Distribution Inc.'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Tier II reporting software shows the facility 'Praxair Distribution Inc.' (FAC-00147) loaded or an import dialog indicating the successful import of 'praxair_import.xml'.

task_completion.description: Update CBI claims for 'Proprietary Cooling Blend X-40'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chemical details screen for 'Proprietary Cooling Blend X-40' (CAS 68476-85-7) shows the 'Trade Secret' option checked and the generic class name entered as 'Refrigerant Gas Blend'.
The chemical details screen for 'Anhydrous Ammonia' (CAS 7664-41-7) shows the storage location marked as 'Confidential' (or similar checkbox checked) and the 'Trade Secret' option unchecked.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Sulfuric Acid' has no CBI claims set
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chemical details screen for 'Sulfuric Acid' (CAS 7664-93-9) shows that neither 'Trade Secret' nor 'Confidential' storage location options are checked.
A save dialog or confirmation message showing the facility data being exported to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\praxair_cbi_export.xml'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Tier II reporting software GUI to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the actual Tier II reporting application interface, not a text editor or IDE directly modifying the XML file.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands that directly write or echo the expected XML content into 'praxair_cbi_export.xml'.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely exported the file through the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The export file should be generated via the application's 'Export' or 'Save As' functionality, visible through dialog boxes or application status messages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must export the modified data to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\praxair_cbi_export.xml'. The target chemicals must have the following CBI claims: 'Proprietary Cooling Blend X-40' (CAS 68476-85-7) must have Trade Secret checked and Generic Name 'Refrigerant Gas Blend'; 'Anhydrous Ammonia' (CAS 7664-41-7) must have Location Confidential checked and Trade Secret unchecked; 'Sulfuric Acid' (CAS 7664-93-9) must have both Trade Secret and Location Confidential unchecked.
